sections.about:
About Us

Our Mission

MemeLaunch Tycoon is a pioneering Web3 education platform that empowers users to learn about cryptocurrency markets, tokenomics, and blockchain economics in a risk-free simulation environment. Founded in 2026, we believe that understanding crypto culture and decentralized finance shouldn't require risking real capital.

What We Do

Our platform simulates the complete lifecycle of launching and trading meme coins, including:

  • Token Creation: Design and launch your own virtual meme coin with custom name, symbol, and supply
  • Market Dynamics: Experience realistic bonding curve mechanics, price discovery, and trading volume fluctuations
  • Community Building: Learn how social momentum affects token valuation without risking real assets
  • Risk Education: Understand why 99% of real meme coins fail and how to identify red flags
  • Technical Analysis: Practice reading K-line charts (candlestick patterns) and market indicators

By The Numbers

50,234
Active Users
12,567
Coins Launched
$2.5M
Virtual Volume
120+
Countries

All statistics represent simulated in-game activity. No real cryptocurrency or financial transactions are involved.

Our Educational Philosophy

We're committed to responsible Web3 education. Our platform is designed to teach users about:

  • The speculative nature of meme coin markets
  • How pump-and-dump schemes operate (so users can recognize and avoid them)
  • The importance of fundamental analysis vs. hype-driven trading
  • Risk management principles that apply to all investments
  • The difference between legitimate blockchain projects and speculative tokens

Who We Are

MemeLaunch Tycoon is operated by our game development studio focused on gamified financial education. Our team includes former blockchain developers, game designers, and educators passionate about democratizing financial literacy.

Headquarters: Hong Kong
Company Registration: Hong Kong
Business Inquiries: business@memelaunchtycoon.com

Legal Status

MemeLaunch Tycoon is not registered as a financial services provider, securities exchange, money transmitter, or cryptocurrency exchange in any jurisdiction. We do not require licensing as we provide only simulated gaming experiences with no real-world financial implications.

Contact Us

We're here to help! Whether you have questions about gameplay, technical issues, partnership inquiries, or legal concerns, please reach out using the channels below.

General Support

Email: support@memelaunchtycoon.com

Response Time: 24-48 hours

For gameplay questions, account issues, or technical support

Business Inquiries

Email: business@memelaunchtycoon.com

Response Time: 3-5 business days

For partnerships, advertising, media, or B2B opportunities

Privacy & Data Requests (GDPR/CCPA)

Email: privacy@memelaunchtycoon.com

Response Time: 30 days (as required by law)

For data access, deletion, portability, or opt-out requests

Security Issues

Email: support@memelaunchtycoon.com

Response Time: 24 hours (priority)

For reporting vulnerabilities, abuse, or security concerns

Social Media & Community

Twitter/X
@memelaunchtycoon
Telegram
Official Community
Discord
Join 10k+ Players

Contact Form (Example Structure)

For AI Developer: Implement this form structure with your backend

GDPR Data Subject Rights

If you are a resident of the European Economic Area (EEA) or United Kingdom, you have the following rights regarding your personal data:

Right Description How to Exercise
Right of Access Request a copy of all personal data we hold about you Email privacy@memelaunchtycoon.com with subject "GDPR Access Request"
Right to Rectification Correct inaccurate or incomplete data Log into your account and update settings, or email privacy@
Right to Erasure Request deletion of your account and all associated data Email privacy@ with subject "GDPR Deletion Request"
Right to Data Portability Receive your data in machine-readable format (CSV/JSON) Email privacy@ with subject "GDPR Portability Request"
Right to Object Object to processing of your data for marketing purposes Click "Unsubscribe" in emails or email privacy@
Right to Restrict Processing Temporarily limit how we use your data Email privacy@ with specific restrictions requested

We will respond to all requests within 30 days as required by GDPR Article 12(3). You may also lodge a complaint with your local data protection authority.

CCPA Rights (California Residents)

California residents have additional rights under the California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA/CPRA):

  • Right to Know: Request disclosure of personal information collected in the past 12 months
  • Right to Delete: Request deletion of personal information (subject to certain exceptions)
  • Right to Opt-Out of Sale: We do NOT sell personal information, but you can opt-out of data sharing with advertising partners
  • Right to Non-Discrimination: We will not discriminate against you for exercising your CCPA rights

Do Not Sell My Personal Information

To opt-out of data sharing with advertising partners, email privacy@memelaunchtycoon.com with subject "CCPA Opt-Out" or use the "Cookie Settings" button on our website.

Mailing Address (Physical Correspondence)

MemeLaunch Tycoon
[Company Legal Name]
[Street Address]
[City, State/Province ZIP/Postal Code]
[Country]

Please note that email correspondence receives faster responses. Physical mail may take 7-14 days to process.
sections.privacy:
Privacy Policy

Effective Date: February 21, 2026

Last Updated: February 21, 2026

This Privacy Policy describes how MemeLaunch Tycoon ("we," "us," "our") collects, uses, and protects your personal information when you visit our website and use our gaming services.

1. Game Simulation & Financial Disclaimer

CRITICAL NOTICE FOR ADVERTISING COMPLIANCE

MemeLaunch Tycoon is a web-based simulation game designed for entertainment and educational purposes only. All references to "tokens," "coins," "MLT (MemeLaunch Token)," "cryptocurrency," or other virtual assets are fictional game elements with ZERO real-world monetary value.

  • NO real cryptocurrency (Bitcoin, Ethereum, Solana, etc.) is used, earned, bought, sold, or transferred on this platform
  • NO real money or fiat currency is required or involved in any gameplay
  • Users CANNOT withdraw or exchange virtual game assets for real money or cryptocurrency
  • This platform does NOT provide financial advice, investment recommendations, or trading signals
  • We are NOT a cryptocurrency exchange, broker-dealer, investment advisor, or money transmitter

Regulatory Compliance: We operate as a gaming entertainment service, not a financial service. We do not require licensing from financial regulatory bodies (SEC, CFTC, FinCEN, FCA, etc.) as we provide only simulated experiences with no real financial transactions.

2. Information We Collect

2.1. Information You Provide to Us (Voluntarily)

  • Account Registration: Username, email address, password (encrypted), optional profile picture
  • Contact Forms: Name, email address, message content when you contact support
  • Payment Information: If you purchase VIP subscription or MLT, we collect billing information through our payment processor (Stripe). We do NOT store full credit card numbers on our servers.
  • User-Generated Content: Coin names, descriptions, images uploaded for your virtual coins

2.2. Information Collected Automatically

  • Device & Browser Data: IP address, browser type and version, operating system, device identifiers, screen resolution
  • Usage Analytics: Pages visited, time spent on site, clicks, gameplay actions (coin launches, trades, etc.)
  • Cookies & Tracking: We use cookies for authentication, preferences, analytics, and advertising (see Section 7)
  • Cloudflare Security Data: Cloudflare collects IP addresses and request metadata to protect our site from DDoS attacks and malicious traffic (see Cloudflare Privacy Policy)

2.3. Third-Party Data Sources

  • Social Login: If you log in via Google, Twitter, or MetaMask, we receive your public profile information (name, email, avatar) as permitted by those services
  • Advertising Partners: Google AdSense and crypto ad networks (Coinzilla, Bitmedia) may collect data about your visits to our site for ad targeting purposes

Legal Basis (GDPR): We process your data based on (a) contractual necessity (Article 6(1)(b)) to provide the game, (b) consent (Article 6(1)(a)) for marketing cookies, and (c) legitimate interests (Article 6(1)(f)) for security and analytics.

3. IAB Transparency & Consent Framework (TCF v2.3)

We participate in the IAB Europe Transparency & Consent Framework v2.3 to ensure your data privacy rights are respected when serving personalized advertising.

What is TCF v2.3?

The IAB TCF is a standardized framework that allows you to provide or withdraw consent for how your data is used by advertising technology vendors. As of February 28, 2026, all consent signals must comply with TCF v2.3 requirements (see IAB Europe TCF v2.3 Policy).

How We Implement TCF v2.3

  • We use a certified Consent Management Platform (CMP) to display a cookie consent banner when you first visit our site
  • The CMP collects your consent choices for different data processing purposes:
    • ▸ Purpose 1: Store and/or access information on a device
    • ▸ Purpose 2: Select basic ads
    • ▸ Purpose 3: Create a personalized ads profile
    • ▸ Purpose 4: Select personalized ads
    • ▸ Purpose 7: Measure ad performance
    • ▸ Purpose 8: Measure content performance
    • ▸ Purpose 9: Apply market research to generate audience insights
    • ▸ Purpose 10: Develop and improve products
  • Your consent choices are stored in a TC String (Transparency and Consent String) encoded cookie
  • You can change your preferences at any time by clicking the "Cookie Settings" or "Privacy Preferences" button in our website footer
  • For EU/EEA visitors, we will NOT load advertising scripts until you provide explicit consent (except for non-personalized ads)

TCF Vendor List

We work with the following TCF-registered advertising vendors:

Vendor Purpose Privacy Policy
Google AdSense Display advertising, ad measurement Google Privacy
Coinzilla Crypto-focused display ads Coinzilla Privacy
Bitmedia Blockchain/crypto advertising network Bitmedia Privacy

View the complete IAB TCF vendor list at https://iabeurope.eu/vendor-list/

4. Third-Party Advertising & Revenue Model

MemeLaunch Tycoon is a free-to-play game supported by advertising revenue. We partner with the following ad networks:

4.1. Google AdSense

  • What They Collect: Cookies, IP address, device identifiers, browsing history
  • Purpose: Serve personalized ads based on your interests
  • Your Control: Visit Google Ad Settings to opt-out of personalized ads
  • Privacy Policy: Google Advertising Policies

4.2. Crypto Ad Networks (Coinzilla, Bitmedia)

  • Why We Use Them: Higher eCPM for crypto-interested audiences (typically 2-3× higher than general ad networks)
  • Ad Types: Banner ads, interstitial ads (after coin creation), rewarded video ads (earn bonus game currency)
  • Compliance: These networks are vetted for compliance with crypto advertising regulations

4.3. Rewarded Ads (Optional)

You can voluntarily watch 30-second video ads to earn bonus in-game currency (e.g., 1,000 virtual MLT). This is entirely optional and does not affect core gameplay. Rewarded ad data may be shared with video ad networks (AdMob, Unity Ads) for analytics.

AdSense Compliance Statement (Required)

Third-party vendors, including Google, use cookies to serve ads based on a user's prior visits to this website. Google's use of advertising cookies enables it and its partners to serve ads to users based on their visit to this site and/or other sites on the Internet. Users may opt out of personalized advertising by visiting Google Ads Settings.

5. Data Security (Cloudflare Protection)

We take data security seriously and implement multiple layers of protection:

5.1. Cloudflare Edge Security

  • DDoS Protection: Cloudflare's network blocks malicious traffic before it reaches our servers
  • SSL/TLS Encryption: All data transmitted between your browser and our site is encrypted using HTTPS
  • Web Application Firewall (WAF): Blocks SQL injection, XSS attacks, and other web vulnerabilities
  • Cloudflare Turnstile: Bot protection that replaces traditional CAPTCHAs, ensuring only real users access our platform (see Turnstile Privacy Addendum)

5.2. Application-Level Security

  • Password Encryption: User passwords are hashed using bcrypt with salt (never stored in plain text)
  • JWT Authentication: Secure session tokens with expiration
  • Rate Limiting: API requests are rate-limited to prevent abuse (max 100 requests per minute per IP)
  • Input Sanitization: All user inputs are validated and sanitized to prevent injection attacks

5.3. Data Retention

Data Type Retention Period Reason
Account Information Until account deletion Provide game service
Gameplay History Until account deletion Leaderboards, statistics
Support Tickets 90 days after resolution Quality assurance
Server Logs 30 days Security monitoring
Marketing Cookies 13 months (GDPR max) Ad personalization
Payment Records 7 years Tax compliance

When you delete your account, we permanently remove your personal data within 30 days, except where we are legally required to retain certain records (e.g., payment history for tax purposes).

6. Your Data Privacy Rights

6.1. GDPR Rights (EU/EEA/UK Residents)

Under the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), you have the following rights:

Right of Access

Request a copy of all your personal data

Email: privacy@memelaunchtycoon.com

Right to Rectification

Correct inaccurate data

Update in Account Settings

Right to Erasure

Delete your account and data

Email: privacy@memelaunchtycoon.com

Right to Portability

Export your data (JSON/CSV)

Available in Account Settings

Right to Object

Stop marketing emails

Click "Unsubscribe" in emails

Right to Restrict

Limit data processing temporarily

Email: privacy@memelaunchtycoon.com

6.2. CCPA/CPRA Rights (California Residents)

Under the California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA) and California Privacy Rights Act (CPRA), California residents have additional rights:

  • Right to Know: Request disclosure of personal information we've collected in the past 12 months (categories, sources, purposes, third parties)
  • Right to Delete: Request deletion of your personal information (subject to exceptions for legal obligations)
  • Right to Correct: Request correction of inaccurate personal information (new in CPRA 2023)
  • Right to Opt-Out of Sale/Sharing: We do NOT "sell" personal information for monetary compensation. However, we share data with advertising partners (AdSense, Coinzilla), which may be considered "sale" or "sharing" under CCPA. You can opt-out via "Cookie Settings" or by emailing privacy@
  • Right to Limit Sensitive Personal Information: We do not collect sensitive personal information as defined by CPRA
  • Right to Non-Discrimination: We will not discriminate against you for exercising your CCPA rights (no denial of service, different pricing, or different quality of service)

DO NOT SELL MY PERSONAL INFORMATION (CCPA Opt-Out)

To opt-out of data sharing with advertising partners, click the "Do Not Sell My Personal Information" link in our footer, or email privacy@memelaunchtycoon.com with subject "CCPA Opt-Out".

Note: Opting out will result in non-personalized ads only. This does not affect your ability to use the game.

6.3. How to Exercise Your Rights

To submit a privacy request, email privacy@memelaunchtycoon.com with:

  • Your full name and registered email address
  • Type of request (access, deletion, portability, opt-out, etc.)
  • Verification information (we may ask you to verify your identity by logging into your account or providing additional details)

Response Time: We will respond within 30 days (GDPR) or 45 days (CCPA), extendable by another 30/45 days for complex requests.

6.4. Lodge a Complaint

If you believe we have not adequately addressed your privacy concerns, you have the right to lodge a complaint with your local data protection authority:

  • EU/EEA: Contact your national Data Protection Authority (list at EDPB Members)
  • UK: Information Commissioner's Office (ICO) - ico.org.uk
  • California: California Privacy Protection Agency - cppa.ca.gov

7. Cookie Policy & Consent Management

7.1. What Are Cookies?

Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit our website. They help us remember your preferences, authenticate your session, and provide personalized experiences.

7.2. Types of Cookies We Use

Category Purpose Duration Consent Required?
Strictly Necessary Authentication, security, basic site functionality Session / 30 days No (exempt)
Performance Analytics (Google Analytics, Cloudflare Analytics) 13 months Yes
Functional Language preference, theme (dark/light mode), volume settings 12 months Yes
Advertising Google AdSense, Coinzilla, Bitmedia personalized ads 13 months Yes (required)
Social Media Twitter/X, Telegram share buttons Varies Yes

7.3. Specific Cookies

_ga - Google Analytics (Performance)
_gid - Google Analytics (Performance)
__cf_bm - Cloudflare Bot Management (Necessary)
euconsent-v2 - IAB TCF v2.3 Consent String (Necessary)
auth_token - User Authentication (Necessary)
theme_preference - Dark/Light Mode (Functional)
__ads_prefs - Google AdSense Personalization (Advertising)
coinzilla_id - Coinzilla Ad Tracking (Advertising)

7.4. Managing Your Cookie Preferences

You have full control over cookies:

  • Cookie Consent Banner: When you first visit, our CMP will ask for your consent choices
  • Cookie Settings: Click "Cookie Settings" in the footer to change your preferences at any time
  • Browser Settings: You can block or delete cookies through your browser settings (note: blocking necessary cookies may break site functionality)
  • Opt-Out Tools:
    • ▸ Google Ads: adssettings.google.com
    • ▸ NAI Opt-Out: optout.networkadvertising.org
    • ▸ DAA Opt-Out: optout.aboutads.info

7.5. Google Consent Mode v2

We implement Google Consent Mode v2, which adjusts how Google tags behave based on your consent choices. If you deny advertising cookies, Google will use "cookieless pings" that do not store identifiers but still allow basic measurement. Learn more at Google Consent Mode.

8. Children's Privacy (18+ Only)

AGE RESTRICTION: 18+ ONLY

MemeLaunch Tycoon is intended for users aged 18 years or older. We do not knowingly collect personal information from individuals under 18. If you are under 18, you must not use this service or provide any personal information to us.

COPPA & GDPR-K Compliance

  • We comply with the Children's Online Privacy Protection Act (COPPA) by excluding children under 13 from our service
  • We comply with GDPR Article 8 (Age of Consent for Information Society Services), which requires parental consent for users under 16 in most EU countries. Our 18+ policy exceeds this requirement.
  • If we discover that a user under 18 has provided personal information, we will delete it immediately
  • Parents/guardians can report underage accounts by emailing privacy@memelaunchtycoon.com with subject "Underage Account Report"

Age Verification

During registration, users must confirm they are 18+ by checking a declaration box. We may also implement Cloudflare Turnstile age verification challenges for high-risk regions.

9. International Data Transfers

MemeLaunch Tycoon is hosted on global infrastructure. Your personal data may be transferred to and processed in countries outside your country of residence, including the United States.

9.1. Cloudflare Edge Network

We use Cloudflare's global edge network, which processes data at the nearest data center to your location to optimize speed and security. Cloudflare is certified under the EU-US Data Privacy Framework and maintains Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs) for GDPR compliance. Learn more at Cloudflare GDPR Compliance.

9.2. Data Transfer Safeguards

  • EU Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs): We use EU Commission-approved SCCs for transfers to third countries without adequacy decisions
  • UK International Data Transfer Agreement (IDTA): For UK users, we comply with the UK IDTA
  • Swiss Data Protection Act: For Swiss users, we ensure equivalent protection as required by FADP
  • Encryption in Transit: All data transfers use TLS 1.3 encryption

9.3. Third-Party Processors by Location

Service Location Safeguard
Cloudflare (Security) Global (Edge) EU-US DPF, SCCs
Vercel (Hosting) United States EU-US DPF, SCCs
Google AdSense United States EU-US DPF, Google Privacy Shield
Stripe (Payments) United States/EU EU-US DPF, SCCs, PCI-DSS
AWS (Database) EU-West-1 (Ireland) Data residency in EU

10. Changes to This Privacy Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time to reflect changes in our practices, technology, legal requirements, or other factors. When we make material changes, we will:

  • Update the "Last Updated" date at the top of this policy
  • Display a prominent notice on our homepage for 30 days
  • Send an email notification to registered users (if the change materially affects their rights)
  • Re-prompt for consent if required by GDPR or other laws

Contact Information

Data Protection Officer (DPO)

Email: privacy@memelaunchtycoon.com
Subject Line: [Privacy Request - Your Name]

Mailing Address:

MemeLaunch Tycoon - Privacy Department
[Company Legal Name]
[Street Address]
[City, State/Province ZIP]
[Country]

EU Representative (GDPR Article 27)

If we do not have an establishment in the EU, we will appoint an EU representative as required by GDPR Article 27. Details will be provided here when applicable.
sections.terms:
Terms of Service

Effective Date: February 21, 2026

Last Updated: February 21, 2026

By accessing or using MemeLaunch Tycoon, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. We could apply any changes to the following terms or conditions without official notifications. If you disagree, please do not use this service.

1. Acceptance of Terms & Eligibility

1.1. Binding Agreement

These Terms of Service ("Terms") constitute a legally binding agreement between you ("User," "you") and our company ("Company," "we," "us," "our"), the operator of MemeLaunch Tycoon (the "Service"). By creating an account, accessing the website, or using any features of the Service, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms and our Privacy Policy.

1.2. Age Requirement

YOU MUST BE AT LEAST 18 YEARS OLD TO USE THIS SERVICE

By using MemeLaunch Tycoon, you represent and warrant that you are at least 18 years of age. If you are under 18, you are prohibited from using this Service. We reserve the right to terminate accounts and delete data of users who do not meet this requirement.

1.3. Geographic Restrictions

The Service is intended for users worldwide. However, availability may be restricted in certain jurisdictions due to local laws. By using the Service, you represent that your use complies with all applicable laws. We reserve the right to restrict access from specific regions at our sole discretion.

1.4. Changes to Terms

We may modify these Terms at any time. Material changes will be announced via email and/or a prominent notice on the website. Your continued use of the Service after changes become effective constitutes acceptance of the revised Terms. If you do not agree to the new Terms, you must stop using the Service and may delete your account.

2. Game Simulation & Financial Disclaimer

CRITICAL DISCLAIMERS (READ CAREFULLY)

2.1. Entertainment & Educational Purpose Only

MemeLaunch Tycoon is a web-based simulation game designed solely for entertainment, education, and research purposes. It is NOT:

  • A cryptocurrency exchange, trading platform, or financial marketplace
  • A money transmitter, payment processor, or financial institution
  • An investment advisor, broker-dealer, or securities exchange
  • A source of financial advice, investment recommendations, or trading signals

2.2. No Real-World Financial Value

All virtual assets within the Service, including but not limited to:

  • "MLT" (MemeLaunch Token)
  • "Diamonds" (premium currency)
  • User-created "coins" or "tokens"
  • Virtual balances, portfolios, or holdings
  • Leaderboard rankings or achievements

have ZERO real-world monetary value. These are purely fictional game elements with no connection to actual cryptocurrencies, blockchain networks, or financial markets.

2.3. No Real Cryptocurrency Involved

No actual cryptocurrency (Bitcoin, Ethereum, Solana, USDT, USDC, or any other digital asset) is used, earned, bought, sold, traded, transferred, or stored on this platform. Users cannot:

  • Deposit real cryptocurrency to the Service
  • Withdraw virtual game assets as real cryptocurrency
  • Exchange virtual assets for fiat currency (USD, EUR, etc.)
  • Transfer virtual assets to external wallets or exchanges

2.4. Not Investment Advice

Nothing on this Service constitutes investment, financial, legal, or tax advice. The information presented is for simulation and educational purposes only. You should consult a licensed financial advisor before making any real-world investment decisions. We are not responsible for any financial losses incurred due to misunderstanding the nature of this simulation.

2.5. Risk Education

This simulation is designed to teach users about the extreme risks of speculative meme coin trading, including but not limited to: total loss of capital, market manipulation, rug pulls, pump-and-dump schemes, liquidity crises, and regulatory uncertainty. By using this Service, you acknowledge that real-world cryptocurrency trading carries significant financial risk and is not suitable for all individuals.

3. Virtual Currency & Premium Features

3.1. Virtual Currency (MLT & Diamonds)

The Service offers two types of virtual currency:

  • MLT (MemeLaunch Token): Earned through gameplay (launching coins, trading, completing missions). Used to create coins, pre-purchase tokens, and participate in the simulated market.
  • Diamonds: Premium currency that can be purchased with real money (via Stripe or other payment processors) or earned through optional rewarded video ads. Diamonds can be exchanged for MLT or used to unlock premium features.

3.2. Purchasing Diamonds

If you choose to purchase Diamonds with real money:

  • All purchases are final and non-refundable, except as required by law
  • Prices are displayed in USD and may vary by region
  • Payment processing is handled by Stripe (see Stripe Privacy Policy)
  • You are responsible for any applicable taxes
  • Purchased Diamonds will be credited to your account immediately upon successful payment

3.3. No Redemption or Exchange

IMPORTANT: Virtual Currency Has No Real Value

You acknowledge and agree that:

  • Virtual currency (MLT, Diamonds) cannot be redeemed for real money
  • Virtual currency cannot be transferred to other users
  • Virtual currency cannot be exchanged for cryptocurrency, gift cards, or any real-world goods
  • Virtual currency has no inherent monetary value outside the Service
  • We may discontinue or modify virtual currency at any time

3.4. VIP Subscription

The Service offers an optional VIP subscription with premium features:

  • Unlimited coin creation
  • Advanced analytics and charting tools
  • Ad-free experience
  • Exclusive VIP badge
  • Priority customer support
  • Bonus Diamonds monthly

VIP subscriptions automatically renew monthly unless cancelled. You may cancel at any time through Account Settings. Cancellation takes effect at the end of the current billing period.

3.5. Refund Policy

All purchases are generally non-refundable except:

  • Technical errors preventing delivery of purchased items
  • Duplicate charges due to payment processor errors
  • As required by applicable consumer protection laws

4. User Accounts & Security

4.1. Account Registration

To access certain features of the Service, you must create an account. You agree to:

  • Provide accurate, current, and complete information during registration
  • Maintain and promptly update your account information
  • Keep your password secure and confidential (use a strong, unique password)
  • Notify us immediately of any unauthorized access to your account
  • Accept responsibility for all activities that occur under your account

4.2. Account Security

You are solely responsible for maintaining the security of your account. We implement industry-standard security measures (see Privacy Policy Section 5), but we cannot guarantee absolute security. You agree to:

  • Not share your account credentials with third parties
  • Not use another user's account without permission
  • Enable two-factor authentication (2FA) if available
  • Log out after each session, especially on shared devices

4.3. Account Termination

You may delete your account at any time through Account Settings. Upon deletion:

  • Your personal data will be permanently deleted within 30 days (see Privacy Policy Section 5.3)
  • All virtual currency (MLT, Diamonds) will be forfeited with no refund
  • Your user-created coins will remain visible in the market (anonymized) for historical data purposes
  • You will lose access to VIP features immediately (no pro-rata refund)

We may terminate or suspend your account at any time for violation of these Terms, illegal activity, or other reasons at our sole discretion (see Section 5).

5. Prohibited Conduct

You agree NOT to engage in any of the following prohibited activities:

5.1. Fraud & Manipulation

  • Creating fake accounts (bots, sockpuppets) to manipulate rankings or markets
  • Using automated scripts, bots, or crawlers to access the Service
  • Artificially inflating coin prices or trading volumes
  • Coordinating pump-and-dump schemes (even in simulation)
  • Exploiting bugs, glitches, or vulnerabilities for unfair advantage

5.2. Illegal Activity

  • Money laundering or terrorist financing (we are NOT a financial service, but we prohibit attempts)
  • Promoting illegal drugs, weapons, violence, or hate speech
  • Violating any applicable laws, regulations, or third-party rights
  • Impersonating another person or entity
  • Harassment, bullying, or threatening other users

5.3. Intellectual Property Violations

  • Uploading copyrighted images without permission (for coin logos)
  • Using trademarked names or logos that infringe third-party rights
  • Reverse engineering, decompiling, or extracting source code from the Service
  • Creating derivative works or competing services based on our platform

5.4. Technical Abuse

  • Attempting to gain unauthorized access to our servers or databases
  • Introducing viruses, malware, or malicious code
  • Overloading our systems (DDoS attacks, spam)
  • Scraping or harvesting user data

5.5. Consequences of Prohibited Conduct

If you violate these Terms, we may:

  • Issue a warning or temporary suspension
  • Permanently terminate your account without refund
  • Remove or hide your user-created content
  • Ban your IP address or device from accessing the Service
  • Report illegal activity to law enforcement authorities
  • Pursue legal action for damages (including attorney fees)

6. Intellectual Property Rights

6.1. Our Intellectual Property

The Service and all content, features, and functionality (including but not limited to text, graphics, logos, icons, images, audio, video, software, and user interfaces) are owned by us or its licensors and are protected by applicable laws.

6.2. User-Generated Content

When you create coins, upload images, write descriptions, or post comments on the Service, you retain ownership of your intellectual property rights. However, you grant us a worldwide, royalty-free, perpetual, irrevocable, non-exclusive license to:

  • Display, reproduce, and distribute your content within the Service
  • Use your content for marketing, promotional, or research purposes (anonymized)
  • Create derivative works (e.g., statistics, leaderboards) based on your content
  • Sublicense your content to third-party service providers (hosting, CDN, analytics)

6.3. Content Moderation

We reserve the right (but not the obligation) to review, remove, or modify any user-generated content that:

  • Violates these Terms or our Community Guidelines
  • Infringes third-party intellectual property rights
  • Contains illegal, offensive, or harmful content
  • Misleads users (e.g., impersonating real cryptocurrency projects)

6.4. DMCA Takedown Procedure

If you believe your copyrighted work has been used without authorization, submit a DMCA takedown notice to:

DMCA Agent Contact:

Email: dmca@memelaunchtycoon.com
Subject: DMCA Takedown Request

Your notice must include: (1) identification of the copyrighted work, (2) location of infringing material, (3) your contact information, (4) statement of good faith belief, (5) statement that the information is accurate, and (6) physical or electronic signature.

7. Disclaimer of Warranties

THE SERVICE IS PROVIDED "AS IS" AND "AS AVAILABLE" WITHOUT WARRANTIES OF ANY KIND

To the fullest extent permitted by law, we disclaim all warranties, express or implied.

8. Limitation of Liability

TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY LAW, WE SHALL NOT BE LIABLE FOR ANY DAMAGES ARISING FROM YOUR USE OF THE SERVICE
